AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>4536ad3e-9e71-4dcb-b187-893facbf63de</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETGImportInputVATReport"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGImportInputVATReport_FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGImportInputVATReport_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="VendAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGImportInputVATReport_VendAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGImportInputVATReportDP.ETGImportInputVATReportTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="CompanyAddress"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.CompanyAddress</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyCoRegNum"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.CompanyCoRegNum</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyGiro"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.CompanyGiro</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyLogo"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.CompanyLogo</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Byte[]</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyName"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.DescriptionOfGoodsServices</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssessmentValue"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGAssessmentValue</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGCompanyCoRegNum"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGCompanyCoRegNum</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDateofEntry"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGDateofEntry</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGEntryNumber"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGEntryNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGExciseDuty"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGExciseDuty</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGPortofEntry"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGPortofEntry</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGVATAmount"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGVATAmount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGVATPercentage"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.ETGVATPercentage</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SourceBaseAmountCur"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.SourceBaseAmountCur</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="SourceRegulateAmountCur"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.SourceRegulateAmountCur</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Total"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.Total</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="VendName"> <DataField>ETGImportInputVATReportTmp.1.VendName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ETGImportInputVATReport</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox5"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun>
